name: my-harness
description: Parallel multi-agent harness for Claude Code + Codex CLI. Bootstraps a Hono / Cloudflare D1 / Playwright / Maestro / Android / iOS project (/my-harness-init), adopts an existing repo (/my-harness-adopt), and keeps it in sync after plugin upgrades (/my-harness-update). /harness-team-lead drives up to 4 lanes (16 teammates: 4 lanes × 4 roles — analyst / engineer / e2e-reviewer / reviewer) with per-lane resource gating; each role can individually delegate to Codex via codex-ask.sh (text) or codex-exec.sh (real file edits / read-only review). One rule set shared across Claude Code / Codex CLI / Cursor / Aider via dev/CLAUDE.md + dev/AGENTS.md pointing at rules/*.md. Built-in observability layer (agent-log + monitor-agents --watchdog) with deterministic lead-side auto-intervention.
